title: Simply Legendary
description: A small Legends Mod based modpack featuring ProjectE compatibility.
body:
I originally designed this modpack for use in a private server where we wanted to have an easier time acquiring most of the materials needed for the powerful suits and abilities from the Legends Mod by adding EMC to many resources that lack it by default.  While the server may no longer be in service, I still want to share this simple pack with others.

This modpack is themed around the [Legends Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-legends-mod/files/4361818) by Tihyo using it as the main content mod and [ProjectE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/projecte/files?page=1&pageSize=20) for assistance with resource acquisition.  There are other supporting mods such as [WAILA](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/waila/files/2230518), [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap/version/1.7.10-5.1.4p6), and [NEI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/notenoughitems/files?page=1&pageSize=20).
